name: cc-market
description: A community marketplace of Claude Code plugins by DawnEver.

plugins.name: takeover
plugins.description: Multi-model AI orchestration — delegate tasks and planning to different model providers (DeepSeek, etc.) directly from Claude Code.

plugins.name: rem
plugins.description: REM sleep for Claude sessions — auto-prunes stale memory on session start, consolidates learnings on session stop, maintains .claude/memory/ with timestamps and 90-day eviction.

plugins.name: sharp-review
plugins.description: Post-feature sharp review — 3 parallel reviewers with schema enforcement, merge findings, sync structured task list with memory cross-references.

plugins.name: watch
plugins.description: Unattended server & long-running task supervision — health checks, anomaly detection, auto-repair, multi-channel alerting. One YAML config per project, zero code changes to adopt.

plugins.name: traceme
plugins.description: Local-first personal observability for Claude Code — token usage, cost, tool usage, daily reports. Hooks capture session/tool/prompt data, transcript parser extracts token/cost.
